toc.label: Delete your account in the app

blocks.md: Naudokis is operated by MB “Naudokis” (company code 307423504), registered address Numėjos g. 6, LT-08402 Vilnius, Lithuania.

blocks.text: 2. Delete your account in the app

blocks.md: You have a 30-day grace period during which you can cancel the deletion using the link in the email we send you. **After the grace period, your account is permanently deleted.**

items: Open the Naudokis app and sign in.
Re-authenticate (your password or social login) to confirm.
Your account is disabled immediately and deletion is queued.

blocks.md: Email info@naudokis.lt from your account’s email address and request account deletion — we process it the same way.

items: Identity, phone and email verification records

blocks.md: Your listings, bookings, chat messages and reviews are anonymized — they remain visible to the other party but no longer carry your name or contact details.

Certain payment, accounting, tax, DAC7 and legal-defence records are kept as required by Lithuanian and EU law for statutory periods, which may be 5 to 10 years or longer where the law requires. Safety and content-moderation reports are kept for up to 3 years. After these periods the data is deleted.
For any questions about deletion or your data, contact info@naudokis.lt.
